column2: Title
column3: Were the research questions, aims, or objectives clearly stated?
column4: Was the geographical scope and meteorological context clearly defined and appropriate?
column5: Was the study population (e.g., meteorological stations, geographic region) clearly defined and appropriate for the research aims?
column6: Was the sample size (e.g., temporal span, number of stations) adequate and justified for the AI/ML techniques employed?
column7: Was the AI/ML model clearly described, including the specific algorithms used, architecture, and hyperparameters?
column8: Were the meteorological variables (inputs) and prediction targets (outcomes) clearly defined?
column9: Were appropriate performance metrics reported for the specific prediction task (e.g., RMSE, MAE, R˛ for regression; Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1, AUC for classification)?
column10: Was the model validated using appropriate strategies (e.g., train/test split, cross-validation, temporal holdout, external validation)?
column11: Were limitations of the study clearly discussed, including data constraints, model assumptions, and generalizability?
column12: Was the study described with sufficient detail to enable reproducibility (e.g., data sources, preprocessing steps, model parameters)?
